logs.message: DVR.Infrastructure depends on dbup-sqlserver (>= 5.0.22) but dbup-sqlserver 5.0.22 was not found. dbup-sqlserver 5.0.37 was resolved instead.
DVR.Infrastructure depends on System.IdentityModel.Tokens.Jwt (>= 8.3.3) but System.IdentityModel.Tokens.Jwt 8.3.3 was not found. System.IdentityModel.Tokens.Jwt 8.4.0 was resolved instead.
